race.comment: SIMPLY GOLD (11) is third-up and sure to appreciate the step up from a 1600m. Wasn't beaten far over 2200m in Stakes grade at Geelong before spelling and presents off solid efforts at Warwick Farm (no luck) and Geelong. Has plenty up his sleeve and he will be finishing hard. MASTER OF WAR (7) found one marginally better last start over 1600m at Wyong after being prominent throughout. Has the inside gate and is seasoned for the step-up to the middle distance. Hutchings rides and he has genuine claims. ON ANY TUESDAY (9) peaks and was much better over 1750m at Muswellbrook last time for a leading barn. Will race handy forward and the middle distance shouldn't be an issue.  FARRAIGE (2) has been racing well enough at Port Macquarie to get some of the minor cash.
